events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 63rd birthday of pop icon George Michael, born in London on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: Tribute to a legend
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His music still sounds as fresh as ever.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: June 25, 2026 marks 17 years since the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who passed away in Los Angeles in 2009 at the age of 50.

angles.name: Remembering the King of Pop
angles.copy: It's 17 years today since we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music and impact continue to resonate globally.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, having been born Richard Starkey in Liverpool on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the legendary Ringo Starr, who turns 86 today! What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today, born in Hampton Hill, Middlesex, on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian May
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Sir Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and all-round rock icon.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born in Dartford, Kent, on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? Still got the moves like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the rock legend.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first video.

angles.name: MTV's big debut
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star, though? We think not!

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years of 'Definitely Maybe'! Oasis's debut album still sounds as vital as it did in '94. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', took place from August 15-18, 1969, on a dairy farm in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years since the start of Woodstock! Three days of peace, love, and incredible music that defined a generation.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years today since we lost Elvis Presley. His music continues to inspire and entertain generations. Long live the King.

events.title: Tupac Shakur's passing 30 years ago
events.blurb: September 13, 2026 marks 30 years since the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died six days later.

angles.name: Tribute to Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years since we lost Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and enduring legacy continue to resonate.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in London on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a guitar legend. Remembering Jimi Hendrix and his revolutionary sound today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years of 'Abbey Road'! The Beatles' timeless masterpiece still sounds incredible. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today, born in Akron, Ohio, on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! A true rock legend and trailblazer with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today, born in Manchester on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam Gallagher
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: First iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod's 25th anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years since Apple launched the original iPod! Remember a time before streaming, when 1,000 songs in your pocket was mind-blowing?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as Global James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in London in 1962.

angles.name: Happy James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and over six decades of iconic cinema.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles co-founder John Lennon, born in Liverpool on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Tribute to John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message live on.
